channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Horrendous road surface - over 12 months unrepaired, 8th June
item.description:
I cannot believe that this road has been left in this state for so many months (over a year) Not only is it a bus route but very heavily used by cyclists - this is worse than a gravel track

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 113, Brecknock Road, Tufnell Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Portable toilet, 8th June
item.description:
Resident on corner of Highfield ave/collindale ave had a party over the weekend these portable toilet was on there property at the time now the party has finished they have dumped these blue portable toilets on the public highways Grass verge outside the property
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Highfield Avenue, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 69 Tottenham Court Road W1, 8th June
item.description:
There is a water leak in the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 64, Tottenham Court Road, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Goodge Street station, 8th June
item.description:
The light is not working. Please can it be fixed? Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chenies Street, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Glen House. Opposite KFC, 8th June
item.description:
The street light is not working. Cannot be fixed please? Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chenies Street, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing bench, 8th June
item.description:
The bench outside Victoria Park, opposite the bowling green, was removed. When will it be replaced? Or why is it not being replaced? Thanks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ballards Lane, Church End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping ( Millstream Road ), 8th June
item.description:
Fly- tipped furniture ( Wooden chest and chair) left discarded on the pavement on Millstream Road under the railway bridge ( Bermondsey). Please remove asap.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Millstream Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter and boxes, 8th June
item.description:
Litter and boxes on corner of Dunlace rd

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dunlace Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain has sunk slightly and a hole has appeared near no entry sign, 8th June
item.description:
I have noticed this before but don't know why I thought more about it this time! It could be a trip hazard for people or a small child could get it's foot caught in the hole?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 126, Horsa Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture, 8th June
item.description:
Hi Hackney council This chair has been dumped outside number 51 Dunlace rd for sometime Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dunlace Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Clothes and litter dumped on street, 8th June
item.description:
Hi Hackney council. Clothes and litter dumped outside number 53/51 Dunlace road. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dunlace Road, Hackney, London

item.title: By railway Claremont road, 8th June
item.description:
Dumped bag of rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Claremont Road, London

item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Abandoned Car in My Parking Space (EP19), 8th June
item.description:
I am the owner of this space and I have been trying with no luck to locate the owner. Management Company suggested that I report the vehicle which is untaxed and in-insured. The vehicle has been left there since November 2025. Please help, I need the use of my parking space. Thanks
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Master Gunner Place, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped furniture outside rental property, 8th June
item.description:
Furniture has been placed in front of numbers 7-8 Ridley Road.the sofa was put outside two weeks ago and now more furniture has been added,the resident doesn’t seem to have any intentions of disposing of these items themselves but is happy to leave this eyesore outside the property.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Darenth Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 x large overgrown hedge rows on close post security risk, 8th June
item.description:
There are 3 long hedgerows that are severely overgrown and are now security risks as they cover anyone trying to hide in them. This is a potential risk to occupiers coming home in the dark. Also they are so overgrown that you can become wet when walking past as the branches stick out everywhere
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whitstable Close, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking fire access and driveway, 8th June
item.description:
More than one car blocking fire and emergency access and driveway for 4 garages.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 30-50cm pothole in the middle of the junction, 8th June
item.description:
Been here for at least 4 months, thought it had already been reported but it does not appear to have been fixed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southborough Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish outside bin store, 8th June
item.description:
Rubbish frequently left in this area.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Holly Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Temporary ramp faulty pavement, 8th June
item.description:
On 8 June 2026 at approximately 20:15, I was cycling outside Swiss Cottage Station adjacent to a construction site when my front bicycle wheel became trapped in a gap between a temporary metal ramp/cover and the adjoining road surface. The gap appeared to run continuously along the edge of the ramp and was approximately 4 cm wide. As my front wheel entered the gap, it became stuck, causing me to lose control and fall from my bicycle. As a result of the fall, I sustained abrasions and bruising to my elbow Photographs were taken immediately after the incident showing the location, the gap between the ramp and the road surface, and the injury sustained. I am reporting this as a potential highway safety hazard because the gap appears capable of trapping bicycle wheels and may present a risk to other cyclists. I would be grateful if the location could be inspected and the responsible party identified. Please could you also confirm whether the temporary ramp/cover is maintained by Camden Council or by a contractor/developer undertaking works at the site, and provide a reference number for this report. I have retained photographs of the defect and the injuries sustained and can provide them if required
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Finchley Road, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Pavement Defect (uneven surface / cracked paving slab)

item.title: Linton Road by church, no street lights and manhole cover in road rattles, 8th June
item.description:
When vehicles drive over the cover the noise is like gunshots. It’s hard to sleep through the noise in the summer. Street is also too dark as there is no street light
Report on FixMyStreet
